spec.name: An Intersection On The Shaded Path
spec.description: You are on a small shaded path leading through the dense forest. The crowns of the old trees leave the forest in an unreal twilight illumination. The path continues north, south, and west.

north.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

south.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

west.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

extra_descs.description: The shaded path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The trees are mostly old beeches and oaks.
